import pandas as pd
from pathlib import Path

# 检查是否有缓存
cache_file = Path\('stock_data/cache/stocks_cache.csv'\)
if cache_file.exists\(\):
    df = pd.read_csv\(cache_file, encoding='utf-8-sig'\)
    print\(f'缓存数据：{len\(df\)} 只股票'\)
    print\(df.columns.tolist\(\)\)
    print\(df.head\(3\)\)
else:
    print\('无缓存数据'\)
" 2>&1)
